purpose: Record the Track 2 challenge-stage safety result, harness-quality repair, and the effort/value lesson from the regular Stage 4 pressure probe.

challenge_stage.finding: Challenge-stage body contact could spend a ship, contradicting the preserved challenge-stage reference rule that bonus stages are non-attacking/non-lethal scoring rounds.
challenge_stage.evidence: harness:check:challenge-outcomes, advanced persona seed 3201, ship_lost cause enemy_collision at t=11.917 on stage 3 challenge before the fix
challenge_stage.impact: The first challenge stage was not safely separable from combat-stage pressure, which blocked deeper challenge-stage choreography.

harness_quality.finding: Challenge-stage correspondence could write an ok:false report without failing the npm command when browser-backed runs failed.
harness_quality.evidence: reference-artifacts/analyses/correspondence/challenge-stage-timing/2026-05-06-3216ba8 initially contained null metrics and run errors from the macOS sandboxed browser path
harness_quality.impact: Long-cycle evidence could look complete while actually containing unsupported measurements.

regular_stage_pressure.finding: Stage 4 regular pressure remains a separate blocker and should not be treated as solved by the challenge-stage fix.
regular_stage_pressure.evidence: harness:check:stage-pressure still failed on stage4-five-ships and stage4-survival with regular-stage enemy_collision and occasional enemy_bullet losses
regular_stage_pressure.impact: Track 2 should add a dedicated pressure-risk analysis/heatmap pass before tuning Stage 4.

changes_kept.summary: Challenge-stage enemy body contact now logs challenge_enemy_contact and does not call loseShip while S.challenge is active.
check-challenge-collision now expects non-lethal contact, zero challenge ship losses, zero challenge bullets, and zero challenge attack starts.
analyze-run now reports contactsDuringChallenge in challengeRules.
check-challenge-stage-correspondence now summarizes run errors and exits nonzero when metrics or browser-backed runs fail.
A metric-by-metric conformance gap evolution plan now records the automation path before Track 3 graphics work begins.

changes_rejected.summary: A lower-field Stage 4 graze experiment was tried and backed out.
changes_rejected.reason: It converted one five-ships collision into a graze but did not make stage-pressure pass; survival still showed multiple regular-stage collision/bullet losses. Keeping a questionable regular-stage non-lethal rule without a green pressure gate would be a poor effort/value trade.

not_green.key_read: Stage 4 regular pressure still fails independently of challenge-stage non-lethality.

challenge_fix.reason: A focused runtime/harness repair removed challenge-stage ship losses across novice, advanced, and expert personas while preserving timing correspondence.

stage4_graze_experiment.reason: The experiment produced one local graze but did not clear the broader pressure gate and risked muddying regular-stage Galaga collision semantics.

next_best_compute.reason: Stage 4 needs collision-risk heatmaps, adversarial seed search, and scoreable-dive opportunity analysis before further gameplay tuning.

next_step: Build a Stage 4 pressure-risk analysis pass that mines recent stage-pressure artifacts into collision lanes, source roles, recent pressure, hit-before-collision, and video-quality status before applying any more regular-stage gameplay tuning.
